overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a white coat exploring a metallic medical bay. The character approaches a patient on a medical bed and then moves toward another medical professional working at a cabinet. The environment features industrial metal walls, medical equipment, and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical bay with patient bed and monitoring equipment

events.description: character enters the medical bay from the doorway
slowing down as approaching the patient bed

agents.ego_description: walking into the medical bay and approaching the patient lying on the bed

notable_agents.action: patient lying motionless on the medical bed with medical monitors attached
female medical professional in lab coat standing by a cabinet reviewing medical charts

entered.detail: green medical bed with patient lying on it, equipped with monitoring equipment
tall metal shelving unit mounted on the wall holding medical supplies and folded linens
rolling metal cart with medical instruments and supplies
tall grey metal locker cabinet with ventilation slats
medical monitoring equipment on a rolling stand

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit medical bay with industrial metal walls and approaches a patient lying on a central medical bed. A female medical professional stands in the background near a cabinet. The room contains metal shelving with supplies and various medical equipment.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical bay examination area around patient bed

events.description: moving around the foot of the bed to examine the patient from the other side

agents.ego_description: circling around the patient's bed to examine the patient from different angles

notable_agents.action: patient remains lying on the bed as the camera moves around to the side

entered.detail: stacked white crates of medical supplies on the floor

segments.scene_description: The character moves around the medical bed, circling to the right side to get a better view of the patient. The metal shelving unit becomes more prominent on the right, while the storage locker moves to the background. White medical supply crates are visible stacked near the wall.

events.description: approaching the female medical professional at the file cabinet

agents.ego_description: walking toward and approaching the other medical professional standing at the cabinet

notable_agents.action: female doctor in white lab coat standing at a file cabinet, turning to face the approaching character

entered.detail: tall cabinet with multiple drawers and glass doors containing medical files and supplies
complex medical machinery with monitors and control panels
tall cylindrical oxygen tank with pressure gauges

segments.scene_description: The character moves away from the patient bed and approaches a female medical professional standing at a tall file cabinet. The medical bed is now behind in the background, while medical equipment stations and an oxygen tank become visible on the left side of the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit medical bay, shifting from a close encounter with a patient to a focused approach toward a medical professional. It begins as the character enters the industrial space and moves toward a patient lying on a central medical bed, with metal shelving and supplies lining the walls. As the character circles to the right side of the bed for a better view, the perspective shifts to emphasize stacked white supply crates and a storage locker receding into the background. The scene then opens up as the camera moves away from the patient, passing by oxygen tanks and equipment stations on the left. Finally, the movement concludes as the character approaches a female medical professional standing at a tall file cabinet, leaving the medical bed behind in the distance.
